title: Racial Disparities Persist in Mecklenburg Infant Mortality
summary: Report reveals persistent racial disparities in infant mortality rates in Mecklenburg County despite overall improvements.
charlotte_impact: Highlights critical public health challenges and the need for targeted interventions to address inequities.

title: Protests Erupt Over Silfab Solar Plant in York County
summary: Protesters demand revocation of Silfab Solar's certificate after chemical incidents, citing zoning compliance concerns.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about industrial safety and regulatory oversight in the wake of environmental incidents.

title: Winter Weather Returns with Freezing Temperatures
summary: The Charlotte area will experience freezing temperatures each night through Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: A reminder of seasonal weather changes and potential impact on vulnerable populations.

title: Storms Cause Tree Damage and Power Outages
summary: Severe thunderstorms toppled trees and power lines across the Charlotte area, causing widespread damage.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the vulnerability of infrastructure to severe weather events.

title: Former Councilmembers Launch Government-Relations Firm
summary: Ex-Charlotte councilmembers Bokhari and Egleston launch The Southern Group's Charlotte branch, a government strategy firm.
charlotte_impact: Shows the revolving door between public service and private sector lobbying.

title: Morganton Man Killed in I-40 Rollover Crash
summary: Lee Glover died after his vehicle ran off the road and flipped several times on I-40 in Iredell County.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of highway driving and the importance of road safety.

title: Tornado Confirmed to Have Hit Charlotte Warehouse
summary: The National Weather Service confirms an EF0 tornado struck a Charlotte warehouse during Monday's storms.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the unpredictable nature of severe weather and its potential for localized damage.

title: Man Arrested After Food Lion Parking Lot Standoff
summary: A suspect wanted for multiple felonies was arrested after a standoff in a Food Lion parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates law enforcement efforts to apprehend individuals wanted for serious crimes.

title: Teen Charged with Killing Mother's Boyfriend
summary: A Lancaster County teen is charged with fatally shooting his mother's boyfriend during an argument.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the tragic consequences of domestic disputes and gun violence.

title: Business Owner Describes Tornado Impact on Warehouse
summary: Charlotte business owner recounts the moment a tornado hit his warehouse, expressing relief that no one was hurt.
charlotte_impact: Provides a firsthand account of the impact of severe weather on local businesses.

title: Man Charged with Arson at Iredell County Truck Stop
summary: A Taylorsville man is charged with setting a fire inside an Iredell County truck stop; video evidence exists.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for arson to cause significant property damage and endanger lives.

title: High School Lockdown After False Active Shooter Call
summary: Crest High School was placed on lockdown after a false active shooter call; no threats were found.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the disruption and fear caused by false alarms and the need for vigilance.

title: Man Charged with Attempted Murder After Shooting Roommate
summary: Jose Isabel Sanchez Martinez is charged with attempted murder after allegedly shooting his roommate.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the prevalence of gun violence and its devastating consequences.

title: Thousands Without Power Due to Severe Storms
summary: Severe storms leave over 7,500 Duke Energy customers in North Carolina without power.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the widespread impact of severe weather on infrastructure and daily life.

title: CSX Trains Collide, Derail in Hamlet; No Injuries
summary: Two CSX trains collided in Hamlet, causing 18 cars to derail; no injuries or environmental threats reported.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential risks associated with rail transport and the importance of safety measures.
